ogTitle: Ucarty vs Ucarty West: Climate Safety

heading: Ucarty vs Ucarty West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ucarty, Western Australia and Ucarty West, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ucarty West has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Ucarty (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ucarty or Ucarty West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ucarty has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Ucarty West scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ucarty scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Ucarty West scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ucarty or Ucarty West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ucarty West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
